commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'echo  | base64 -d > ~/workspace/yanxi/stage2/mklog.yaml && kubectl apply -f ~/workspace/yanxi/stage2/mklog.yaml 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation logs mklog-160 2>&1; echo ---; kubectl -n yanxi-validation logs mklog-221 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation delete pod mklog-160 mklog-221 --ignore-not-found 2>&1'
